_comment: Note templates. Keys referenced by rules.json → note_section.template_key. Each template has a list of boilerplate lines; these can be overridden per-project.

general_notes: 1. Contractor shall verify all dimensions and conditions in the field prior to commencement of work.
2. All work shall comply with applicable building codes and local ordinances.
3. Do not scale drawings. Use figured dimensions only.
4. Report any discrepancies to the Architect prior to proceeding.
5. Refer to specifications for material and finish requirements.
code_notes: 1. All work shall comply with the International Building Code (IBC) as adopted locally.
2. Fire-rated assemblies shall be maintained per UL listings.
3. Accessibility requirements per ADA / ICC A117.1 apply throughout.

lines: 1. Contractor shall field-verify all existing conditions prior to demolition.
2. Remove and dispose of demolished material per local regulations.
3. Protect existing construction to remain from damage during demolition.
4. Cap and seal all abandoned utilities. Coordinate with MEP trades.
5. Patch and repair finishes at demolition boundaries to match existing.
1. All new partitions shall be constructed per details on drawings.
2. Provide fire-stopping at all penetrations through rated assemblies.
3. Coordinate new framing with MEP rough-in prior to closing walls.
4. Install vapor / moisture barriers per specifications where indicated.
1. Plumbing fixture locations are diagrammatic. Coordinate exact placement with plumbing engineer.
2. Provide backing and blocking for wall-mounted fixtures.
3. Verify fixture rough-in dimensions with manufacturer's data.
1. Existing conditions shown are based on available as-built documents and field observation.
2. Contractor shall verify all existing conditions prior to construction.
3. Report any discrepancies to the Architect immediately.

scope_note_placeholder: Scope of work for this sheet: [TO BE FILLED PER PROJECT]
